# Registration for Activate 19 Is Now Open - Iterable

## Registration for Activate 19 Is Now Open

**Published by**

October 24, 2018

![Register for Activate 19](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Activate19_Dynamic_Signal_L1R1.png)

Get ready to make 2019 your year for world-class marketing—because we’ve got the event that can’t be missed.

Today we’re announcing that registration for Activate 19 is now open, so make sure to reserve your spot!

Taking place on **April 22-24, 2019**, at the historic Palace Hotel in San Francisco, Activate 19 will host 600+ of the industry’s most innovative marketers to transform the way we think about customer engagement.

### Speakers at Activate 19

Joining us will be our amazing speakers, including Marisa Amorasak, Product Manager, Email, at ShopRunner, and Jessica Owen, Retention Marketing Manager at Policygenius.

We’ll be revealing the list of who’s-who at Activate in the coming months, but here’s what Iterable’s 2018 MVP, Sue Cho, Head of Lifecycle Marketing at Calm, had to say about the conference:

> _“The most valuable part about attending Activate is learning from my peers. Smart people choose Iterable! We as marketers tend to get caught up the daily grind and lose track of the overall vision of what we were trying to achieve in the first place. Activate is a great reminder to keep my high-level goals clear and top-of-mind._
> 
> _I don’t go to many conferences, because usually there’s a lot of fluffy content and not actual strategies and techniques that you could apply back to what you do. But I will absolutely be coming back to Activate next year. It’s such a great learning opportunity that you can’t get anywhere else.”_

Activate is a great platform to share your message and grow your personal brand, so if you’ve got insights on upcoming marketing trends or lessons learned from a successful campaign, apply to speak today.

You don’t have to be an Iterable customer to lead one of our breakout sessions, and you can submit as many session proposals as you’d like. If you’re selected, you’ll receive a complimentary full conference pass.

The deadline to apply is **November 9**, so don’t delay!

### Activate 19 Growth Marketing Awards

If you’ve been leveraging Iterable to power cross-channel customer engagement at scale, we want to recognize your accomplishments at Activate.

We’ll be presenting the Growth Marketing Awards to customers and partners in these six categories:

*   Growth Marketing Team of the Year
*   Most Captive Audience
*   Best Cross-Channel Campaign
*   Most Impactful Transition to Iterable
*   Most Sophisticated use of Workflow Studio
*   Partner of the Year

The deadline to submit your award application is **February 22**, so don’t miss this opportunity to celebrate your team’s achievements.

### Join Us at Activate 19

Past attendees already know that Activate is the place to be to learn growth marketing best practices, hone their marketing skills and build the leading brands of tomorrow.

Cynthia Sanders, Founder and CEO at ROAM Advertising, spoke highly of what the event has to offer:

>  “_My favorite part about the sessions is learning other companies’ market strategies and how they’re implementing their plans. They’re being very transparent about their experiences, what they’ve learned, and their forecasting of the future._
> 
> _I would highly recommend Activate—I learned so much, met a lot of interesting people, exchanged ideas, it was great. You’re missing out on a huge opportunity if you don’t attend!_“

With super early bird pricing now available, you’ll gain full access to the conference, including all keynotes, 40+ educational sessions and a networking happy hour. Iterable customers can also attend a half-day of technical workshops on April 22 for an additional cost.

Once registered, you’ll receive regular updates regarding the conference agenda, speakers, sessions and more. Activate 18 sold out this past spring, so register now to ensure your place next year.

In the meantime, please email activate19@iterable.com with any questions.

We look forward to seeing you at Activate 19!
